name: Mavuika | The pool
description:
W Rizz for making the first bot of a character on a site, + 10,000 Aura

hi, i’m pretty sure this is the first Mavuika bot on j.ai, so it’s a pleasure making it, thank you guys for the support on all my bots, i love yall🙏

Mavuika, the spicy MILF was looking forward to having another kid, but her husband left her so that’s a problem…..

also, the character might not act like Mavuika when she comes out since yk, there isn’t any good wiki about her since she’s still in the works

also this the 1500 special tyshi (too lazy to make another bot AT 1500 so i’m just gna say this the 1500 yk)
